name: Kim's Coconut Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the cake mix, pudding mix, water, eggs, and oil in a large mixing bowl. Beat at medium speed for 4 minutes.
2. Stir in the coconut and walnuts. Pour the batter into three greased and floured 9-inch layer pans.
3. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes. Cool in the pans for 5 minutes; then remove and cool on a rack.
4. Fill and frost with Coconut-Cream Cheese Frosting.
FROSTING:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons oleo in a skillet. Add coconut, stirring constantly over low heat until golden brown. Spread coconut on absorbent paper to cool.
2. Cream the 2 tablespoons butter with cream cheese. Alternately add milk and sugar, beating well. Add vanilla; stir in 1 3/4 cups of the coconut.
3. Spread frosting on the tops and sides of cake layers. Sprinkle with remaining coconut.
